eval_dimensions.name: budget_reporting
eval_dimensions.description: Reports line counts and budget compliance for all context file categories

eval_dimensions.name: oversized_detection
eval_dimensions.description: Identifies files exceeding INDEX.md size budgets

eval_dimensions.name: pruning_suggestions
eval_dimensions.description: Suggests specific, actionable pruning or consolidation actions

eval_dimensions.name: no_unauthorized_edits
eval_dimensions.description: Does not modify files without explicit user approval via AskUserQuestion

evals.expected: Reports OVER status for files exceeding 200-line budget, suggests split actions
Reports OK status for all files, no pruning suggestions needed
Uses override budget instead of default, flags as INFO not WARNING
